# Technical Pricelists for Sales

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:eaadbbf1f8fd1d9a4be8a206105538b33fd5e385d45f0f85ef74a6ed86c3ab78
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extends the functionality of the Pricelist module to make it
possible to create "technical pricelists" that can only be used
to compute another pricelists.

These technical pricelists are hidden in the rest of the Odoo interface,
preventing users from using them on sale order forms, customer forms, etc..

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

To use this module, you should be member of "Technical / Basic Pricelists".

- Go to Sale / Configuration / Pricelists
- Check the box "Is Technical" on your desired pricelist

:::{figure} https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OCA/sale-workflow/16.0/sale_pricelist_technical/static/description/product_pricelist_form.png
:::
